capture_blocks.objective: confirm that both serial paths, both AP paths, and the shared timeline are stable before cooperative capture
operator_instructions: Stay outside both controlled paths while both raw capture processes are started.
Confirm that both raw files are growing and that the alignment note template is open for editing.
Do not continue if one node still lacks a trustworthy AP path or serial stream.
capture_blocks.scenario: two-node transport warm-up and alignment sanity check

capture_blocks.objective: collect the first matched empty cooperative baseline
operator_instructions: Leave the shared operator interaction zone and both controlled paths.
Keep the room layout unchanged for both Node A and Node B.
Record any node-specific disturbance immediately in the alignment notes.
capture_blocks.scenario: shared empty-scene reference for both nodes

capture_blocks.objective: capture the first matched static cooperative segment
operator_instructions: Stand in the shared midpoint zone chosen to be visible to both Node A and Node B.
Stay almost still and do not touch any AP, sensor, stand, or helper host.
If visibility is asymmetric between nodes, record that immediately.
capture_blocks.scenario: static presence in the shared interaction zone

capture_blocks.objective: capture the first matched motion cooperative segment
operator_instructions: Move slowly through the shared interaction zone without leaving the region visible to both nodes.
Keep the topology of both stands unchanged.
Record any timing drift noticed between the two capture hosts.
capture_blocks.scenario: slow motion through the shared interaction zone

capture_blocks.objective: observe the reverse transition back to empty for both nodes
operator_instructions: Leave both controlled paths again.
Keep both nodes powered and both raw capture processes running.
Record any restart or serial glitch explicitly before continuing.
capture_blocks.scenario: empty recovery after the first cooperative cycle

capture_blocks.objective: provide an in-session repeat for the cooperative static segment
operator_instructions: Return to approximately the same shared midpoint used in S1.
Stand almost still and avoid unnecessary motion.
Confirm in notes that both raw streams are still recording.
capture_blocks.scenario: second static presence in the shared interaction zone

capture_blocks.objective: provide an in-session repeat for the cooperative motion segment
operator_instructions: Repeat the same slow-motion pattern used in M1 as closely as practical.
Do not move APs, sensors, helper hosts, or cables.
Record whether node-wise timing still appears coherent.
capture_blocks.scenario: second slow motion in the shared interaction zone

capture_blocks.objective: finish with a matched empty reference and complete alignment notes
operator_instructions: Leave the shared interaction zone one final time and keep both capture processes running until the block ends.
Stop raw capture only after both nodes have finished the same block timeline.
Fill the final trust verdict in notes/per_node_alignment_notes.md before treating the bundle as usable.
capture_blocks.scenario: final empty recovery for cooperative upper-bound anchoring

config.description: D05 coordinated cooperative two-node capture attempt with one primary local ESP32-C5 stream and one helper-node ESP32-C5 stream.
operator_notes: D05 was run as a coordinated multi-sensor cooperative bridge capture.
The primary sensing path used the primary prplOS-compatible dual-band AP node on 5 GHz / channel 36 / 20 MHz.
Node A is the primary local ESP32-C5 serial stream; node B is a helper-node ESP32-C5 UART stream forwarded through a command-backed capture path.
All planned blocks are present in the public block-event log.

This public bundle preserves the honest limitation that the node-B stream stalled at the end, the capture_finished event is missing, the live-sensor row ratio exceeded the gate, and cooperative timing failed.

honesty_notes: Do not treat this D05 bundle as claim-grade cooperative fusion evidence.
Both sensors were live, but node-B produced only 102 CSI rows while node-A produced 1452 rows.
The bundle lacks a clean capture_finished event because node-B stalled after E3.
Cooperative timing evidence failed and is included for auditability.

scripts.description: Check local WSL/Linux dependencies and capture-device visibility.
Apply the requested router radio, SSID, and AccessPoint settings.
Collect router-side snapshots over SSH or serial console.
Build the configured ESP32 firmware workspace.
Flash the configured ESP32 firmware workspace.
Capture the ESP32 serial stream for the configured duration.
Capture the serial stream for auxiliary sensor `esp32-c5-b`.
Run continuous capture streams and pause for operator confirmation between configured capture blocks.
Run preflight, AP setup, AP snapshot, and then the interactive operator-guided capture sequence.
